# Orbitron (local)

Self-hosted copy to avoid Google Fonts and satisfy CSP without external font-src.

- **Source:** [Google Fonts – Orbitron](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Orbitron) (weights 400–900, latin)
- **WOFF2:** From `fonts.gstatic.com/s/orbitron/v35/...`
- **Usage:** `aeco.css` and `master.css` define `@font-face`; use `font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif` (or with fallbacks).

To update the font later, replace `Orbitron.woff2` with a new download from the same Google Fonts URL.
